response.original_title: 𝟭-𝟴𝟴𝟴  𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗛𝗲𝗹𝗽  𝟱𝟳𝟲-𝟮𝟬𝟰𝟭  Can Robinhood reverse a transaction
response.overview: No , Robinhood generally cannot reverse a transaction once it is completed . After a trade is executed, it becomes final and cannot be undone . 「(1)➤(888)✧(576)✧(2041)」 However, if the order is still pending , you may be able to cancel it before execution. Always double-check details before confirming any trade .➔(1)✦(888)✦(576)✦(2041)
